results.title: Lindy Boggs redevelopment plans take another step forward, demolition set for July
results.description: The decades-long effort to demolish the former Lindy Boggs Medical Center took another step forward Tuesday after a City Council committee advanced a lease agreement to build and maintain a stormwater retention tank underneath the site.

results.title: MEDICAL VISIT VIOLATION: ICPC arrests el-Rufai’s doctor
results.description: By Myke Uzendu The Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC) on Tuesday accused former Kaduna State Governor, Mallam Nasir El-Rufai, of violating the conditions of a court-approved medical visit while in its custody. The ICPC also announced the arrest of El-Rufai’s personal physician, Professor Bello Abubakar, alleging... results.title: Virtual Live Programs
results.description: Ready to discover what you'll love about DU? Join us virtually for one of our live information sessions that range from general information to program-specific opportunities. Learn from supportive staff members and get your questions answered in real time by current students and admission counselors. If you're interested in experiencing DU for yourself, check out our in-person visit opportunities and register online. We also offer a virtual campus tour so you can start exploring today!
